shipped_summary: 41 user-facing surfaces, branded icons + sitemap + manifest, 11 OG variants, 108 vitest tests, footnoted strategy, refreshed README. 12 waves done.

shipped.result: /sources /metrics + Slack mock + ref customers + keyboard shortcuts

honest_assessment: 41 surfaces is past the founder-attention horizon. Future ticks should consolidate, not expand. Best ROI from here: deploy to Vercel, record the Loom, and have someone do a cold read of /docs and the 3-min tour.
next_wave_13_candidates_if_continuing: Add a small /diff page showing weekly metric deltas (last small-content add I'd consider)
Wire /chat citations to deep-link with section anchor IDs
Add a /credit page acknowledging the data sources, fonts, libraries used (small + ethical)
Build an /index page that's shorter than /map — top-12 most-relevant routes for the interview
